title: Link: Faces of Evil from Lack of Dinner (Youtube Poop)
description:
Link: Faces of Evil. How it should have gone.

First Poop :D.

The King is off do aid the duke and everyone wants dinner (the king hasnt has any dinner ands he is not happy about it, but he takes some precautions). The Carpet guy comes round to link that his dinner of Ganon is Well-Done. But trouble brews when they forgot to send the king his dinner. The king goes mad and somehow manages to clone himself. but that goes wrong as the clone isnt that interested in the Mad King saying 'My Boy', and mentions dinner (at which point the King wants his clone to die). lol. Enjoy.
